title: SaaS BrandColors theme + portal file fix
description: Tenant setup colors now create a BrandColors theme and auto-apply on {Company}.pipeshare.net. The theme menu shows PIPESHARE instead of ONBRAND on SaaS hosts. Fixed portal file explorer error for SaaS tenants (Wasabi adapter blocking saas_tenant_instances queries).
changeLog: BrandColors theme generated from setup wizard primary/accent colors.
SaaS theme picker: ONBRAND renamed to PIPESHARE; BrandColors appears when colors are set.
Postgres live-query allowlist includes saas_tenant_instances for tenant virtualbox file access.
